scope: same source-boundary S4096 layer-2 rocWMMA score-page dKV producer with SCORE_PAGE_MODE 0/1/2

tile.schedule_read: D512 score-page rocWMMA source-boundary rung. One CTA owns a token/selected tile, computes QK and dO.V score pages with rocWMMA from gathered selected KV, forms prob/scaled-dP in shared memory, then sweeps D16 contribution fragments before global dKV atomics. This removes D-block score replay but still does not include dQ or a final production-quality grouped dKV epilogue.

read: The same-kernel split shows the current rocWMMA score-page rung is limited by all three stages: source score-page recompute is already 32.57 ms, contribution sweep adds 29.75 ms, and global dKV atomics/write add 43.11 ms. This confirms the next branch must be a production MFMA/CK schedule, not only a dKV epilogue tweak.
